scope.objective: Source registry for investment history, inflation, rent legality, short-term rental feasibility, renovation materials, and renovation cost benchmarking.

quality_rules: Official transaction, rent, inflation, and construction-cost data beats portal listing data.
Portal and retailer data are useful for benchmarks, but every row needs source_url, captured_at, currency, unit, and market.
Retail product price is not installed cost; labour, demolition, delivery, permits, waste, contractor margin, and contingency must stay separate.
Do not heavy scrape or bypass site protections. Prefer official APIs, CSV exports, partner feeds, manual vendor CSVs, and compliant low-frequency price capture.
Investment verdicts must show confidence flags when the local transaction count, rent sample, DPE data, or legal eligibility is weak.

target_tables.name: dubai_zone_quarter_price_index
target_tables.purpose: Historical price per sqft, liquidity, nominal CAGR, and real CAGR.

target_tables.name: dubai_zone_rent_yield_index
target_tables.purpose: Ejari-based long-term rent, gross yield, and legal rental-index checks.

target_tables.name: france_commune_year_price_index
target_tables.purpose: DVF/DVF+ city and commune price history for investment projections.

target_tables.name: france_micro_market_price_index
target_tables.purpose: Micro-market trend when geocoded DVF and DPE coverage is sufficient.

target_tables.name: renovation_material_price_snapshot
target_tables.purpose: Searchable material prices for the renovation module.

target_tables.name: renovation_installed_cost_benchmark
target_tables.grain: market, room, work_package, quality_tier, source, captured_at
target_tables.purpose: Installed-cost ranges by room and quality tier.

target_tables.name: property_acquisition_cost_rules
target_tables.purpose: Closing costs, notary/DLD fees, mortgage registration, agency fees and taxes for true ROI.

target_tables.name: property_operating_cost_index
target_tables.purpose: Service charges, copro charges, insurance, property tax, chiller/utilities and maintenance reserves.

target_tables.name: tourism_short_term_rental_demand_index
target_tables.purpose: Tourism occupancy, ADR proxy, seasonality and short-term rental demand confidence.

target_tables.name: housing_supply_pipeline_index
target_tables.purpose: New supply pressure from permits, starts, units, buildings, projects and vacancy.

investment_sources.name: DLD Real Estate Data
investment_sources.coverage: Current real-estate transaction rows with amount, area, size, property type, sub type, rooms, freehold and nearby landmarks where available.
investment_sources.refresh: frequent portal refresh; pull weekly for FonatProp lab
investment_sources.legal_notes: Official DLD open-data page. Attribute DLD and avoid exposing personal or sensitive fields.

investment_sources.name: Dubai Pulse DLD Transactions CSV
investment_sources.publisher: Dubai Land Department via Dubai Pulse
investment_sources.coverage: Historical DLD transactions CSV. Search result observed CSV update 2026-02-11 and source frequency daily.
investment_sources.refresh: daily source; pull monthly or weekly depending on cost
investment_sources.legal_notes: Portal marks rights/license as not specified in some resources. Preserve attribution and validate use before production redistribution.

investment_sources.name: Dubai Pulse DLD Transactions API
investment_sources.publisher: Dubai Land Department via Dubai Pulse
investment_sources.coverage: API resource for transaction data. Search result observed last updated 2024-07-18 and daily source frequency.
investment_sources.refresh: daily source; use incremental pulls when API credentials are available
use_for: filtered pulls by date or area
investment_sources.legal_notes: Requires Dubai Pulse access token. Confirm license and rate limits before automation.

investment_sources.name: Dubai Pulse DLD Rent Contracts CSV
investment_sources.publisher: Dubai Land Department via Dubai Pulse
investment_sources.coverage: Ejari registered tenancy contracts with contract amount, annual amount, dates, property type and line items. Search result observed CSV resource updated in 2026.
investment_sources.refresh: daily source; pull monthly or weekly for yield engine
investment_sources.legal_notes: Portal mentions personal-information rights classification in metadata. Store only fields needed for aggregated analytics.

investment_sources.name: Dubai Pulse DLD Rent Contracts API
investment_sources.publisher: Dubai Land Department via Dubai Pulse
investment_sources.coverage: API resource for all tenancy contracts registered in Ejari. Search result observed last updated 2022-06-07 with daily source frequency.
investment_sources.refresh: daily source; use API for incremental rent snapshots
investment_sources.legal_notes: Requires token. Personal data handling must be minimized and aggregated for product display.

investment_sources.name: DLD Rental Index / Rental Calculator
investment_sources.coverage: Official rental calculator and average market-rent service. Search result observed site updated 2026-03-16.
investment_sources.refresh: manual/service lookup until API path is confirmed
investment_sources.legal_notes: Treat as validation service, not bulk dataset unless DLD exposes approved access.

investment_sources.name: DLD Residential Properties Price Index
investment_sources.coverage: DLD residential price index using hedonic methodology across monthly, quarterly and yearly frequencies.
use_for: fallback when transaction sample is thin
investment_sources.legal_notes: Official index. Keep DLD methodology attribution in reports.

investment_sources.name: Dubai House Price Index Methodology
investment_sources.coverage: Methodology reference for hedonic price index and data-finder distribution.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Reference PDF, not a row-level dataset.

investment_sources.name: Dubai Consumer Price Index
investment_sources.publisher: Dubai Statistics Center via Dubai Pulse
investment_sources.coverage: Dubai CPI for inflation-adjusted property returns.
investment_sources.refresh: monthly or quarterly depending on resource
investment_sources.legal_notes: Official statistical source. Attribute Dubai Statistics Center.

investment_sources.name: Issue a new Holiday Homes permit
investment_sources.publisher: Dubai Department of Economy and Tourism
investment_sources.coverage: Official service for permit workflow before operating a residential unit as a holiday home.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Rules must be displayed as compliance guidance, not legal advice.

investment_sources.name: Demandes de valeurs foncieres
investment_sources.coverage: Official DVF transaction data. Search result observed last update 2026-04-07. Excludes Alsace, Moselle and Mayotte.
investment_sources.refresh: semiannual public release; refresh after April and October releases
investment_sources.legal_notes: Open data under French public data rules. Preserve source attribution and exclude personal assumptions.

investment_sources.name: API DVF
investment_sources.coverage: Programmatic access to DVF-style land-value data.
investment_sources.refresh: use for lookups; bulk work should still use files
investment_sources.legal_notes: Use official API terms. Avoid high-volume calls when bulk files are available.

investment_sources.name: Statistiques DVF
investment_sources.coverage: Aggregated DVF statistics for faster market-level checks.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Use as aggregate support, not replacement for raw DVF.

investment_sources.name: DVF+ open-data
investment_sources.coverage: Geolocated enriched DVF in SQL/PostgreSQL/PostGIS with 17 tables, GeoPackage, and CSV formats.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Use open DVF+ only for commercial product; do not use restricted DV3F owner data.

investment_sources.name: Notaires-INSEE second-hand dwelling price indices
investment_sources.coverage: Quarterly constant-quality old-housing price indices for France, houses, apartments, and local series.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Attribute INSEE and Notaires. Use as index, not individual transaction source.

investment_sources.name: Long series for French housing prices
investment_sources.coverage: Long-run France and Paris housing-price, rent, income, and volume context.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Use for strategic context; keep current valuation based on DVF/Notaires-INSEE.

investment_sources.name: Indice des prix a la consommation
investment_sources.coverage: Official French CPI dataset for deflating property prices and construction costs.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Official public statistical source. Attribute INSEE.

investment_sources.name: API BDM
investment_sources.coverage: API access to INSEE indicators and time series, including CPI and housing/construction indices.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Use official API terms and cache results.

investment_sources.name: Resultats nationaux des observatoires locaux des loyers
investment_sources.publisher: Observatoires locaux des loyers via data.gouv.fr
investment_sources.coverage: Observed rents by type, construction period, number of rooms and occupancy length.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Use as rent benchmark with attribution and confidence notes.

investment_sources.name: Carte des loyers
investment_sources.publisher: Ministere de la Transition ecologique / ANIL
investment_sources.coverage: National rent map built with ANIL, SeLoger and leboncoin partnership data.
investment_sources.refresh: annual; usually Q3 update per public material
investment_sources.legal_notes: Benchmark source, not row-level listing data.

investment_sources.name: Logement - Encadrement des loyers
investment_sources.coverage: Reference, increased reference and decreased reference rents by sector, room count, construction period and furnished status.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Local rules vary. Always display as compliance flag with source date.

investment_sources.name: Simulateur des zones tendues
investment_sources.coverage: Determines whether a dwelling is in a tense rental zone. Search result observed update in April 2026.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Rules are legal/regulatory context. Do not present as legal advice.

investment_sources.name: Location touristique meublee rules
investment_sources.coverage: Short-term rental rules including registration, change of use, 90/120 night cap options, and enforcement context.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Regulatory rules are high stakes. Surface as guidance with source links and require professional validation.

investment_sources.name: Meubles de tourisme and DPE constraints
investment_sources.coverage: Notaires summary observed updated 2026-03-13; includes DPE E minimum from 2024-11-21 and possible 90-night cap from 2025.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Professional legal summary. Confirm with local commune and notaire before investment decision.

investment_sources.name: DLD OA Service Charges
investment_sources.publisher: Dubai Land Department via Dubai Pulse
investment_sources.coverage: Approved service fees for co-owned projects from RERA/Mollak. Search result observed CSV updated 2024-01-05 and yearly source frequency.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Official DLD/RERA data. Attribute DLD and keep budget-year context.

investment_sources.name: Mollak Service Charge Index
investment_sources.coverage: Project-level service charge search by master community, property group, project, usage and budget year.
investment_sources.refresh: manual validation per property or yearly source refresh
investment_sources.legal_notes: Use as validation service unless an approved bulk/API route is available.

investment_sources.name: DLD Units Open
investment_sources.publisher: Dubai Land Department via Dubai Pulse
investment_sources.coverage: Related DLD resource observed for freehold units registered in DLD, with CSV updated 2026-02-22 in search result context.
investment_sources.refresh: monthly or after major DLD update
investment_sources.legal_notes: Official DLD registration source. Avoid owner/person-level data and use only property attributes needed for analytics.

investment_sources.name: DLD Projects and Buildings Open
investment_sources.publisher: Dubai Land Department via Dubai Pulse
investment_sources.coverage: DLD projects/buildings registration data. Search result observed dld_projects-open related CSV updated 2025-10-03 and buildings API metadata.
investment_sources.refresh: monthly or after DLD project updates
investment_sources.legal_notes: Use project/building attributes only. Do not infer ownership.

investment_sources.name: Dubai Real Estate Legislation and Fee Table
investment_sources.publisher: Dubai Land Department / Rental Disputes Center
investment_sources.coverage: Official real-estate legislation and fee schedule. Search result includes sale contract registration fee at 4% of sale value.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Use as regulatory reference with effective date. Not legal advice.

investment_sources.name: CBUAE EIBOR Rates
investment_sources.coverage: Official EIBOR benchmark rates for UAE mortgage-rate scenarios. Search result observed current-month EIBOR table in April 2026.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Official rate source. Cache snapshots and attribute CBUAE.

investment_sources.name: Dubai Tourism Performance Report
investment_sources.publisher: Dubai Department of Economy and Tourism
investment_sources.coverage: Dubai tourism demand, visitors, hotel occupancy and hospitality metrics. Search result observed 19.59M overnight visitors and 80.7% hotel occupancy in 2025.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Hotel metrics are not holiday-home unit-level data. Use as demand proxy only.

investment_sources.name: API DPE logements
investment_sources.coverage: Open-data API for French DPE housing diagnostics, including post-July-2021 existing housing data.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Use post-2021 method fields carefully; DPE quality can vary and should show confidence.

investment_sources.name: Valeur verte des logements
investment_sources.coverage: Notarial analysis of DPE impact on housing prices. Search result observed 2025 update and 2024 transaction study context.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Study-level coefficients are not automatic property-level guarantees.

investment_sources.name: Credits aux particuliers - housing loans
investment_sources.coverage: Housing loan production, outstanding credit, interest rates and borrower-credit access context. Search result observed January 2026 credit-to-households report.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Official macro-credit data. Use for scenario assumptions, not individual loan offers.

investment_sources.name: Taux d'usure
investment_sources.coverage: Quarterly legal maximum APR/usury thresholds for French credit. Search result observed 2026-Q2 page.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Regulatory credit threshold. Surface as financing constraint, not financing advice.

investment_sources.name: Logements autorises et commences - Sitadel
investment_sources.coverage: Housing permits and starts by year from Sitadel urban-planning authorization forms.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Construction starts can be revised late. Show source vintage.

investment_sources.name: Logements vacants du parc prive
investment_sources.coverage: Private vacant housing counts by commune, department, region and vacancy age. Search result notes detailed LOVAC access is restricted to eligible public actors.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Use public aggregates only. Detailed property-level LOVAC is restricted.

investment_sources.name: Fiscalite locale des particuliers - Geo
investment_sources.coverage: Local tax rates for property tax and related local taxes by commune/intercommunal layers.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Tax owed depends on cadastral rental value and local rates. Use as estimate with caveat.

investment_sources.name: Calculer les frais de notaire
investment_sources.coverage: Official simulator for acquisition/notary fees by property type and department. Search result verified 2026-02-10.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Simulator estimate only. Notarial quote remains authoritative.

investment_sources.name: Assiette des droits de mutation immobiliers
investment_sources.coverage: Monthly real-estate transfer-duty base by department and type of duty. Search result observed update 2026-03-14.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Aggregate tax-base series, not individual transaction data.

investment_sources.name: Frequentation des hebergements touristiques
investment_sources.coverage: Tourist accommodation nights, arrivals, stay lengths for hotels, campsites and other tourist accommodations. Search result observed 2026-02-12 update.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Collective accommodation data is a demand proxy, not unit-level Airbnb revenue.

investment_sources.name: API meubles - guichet unique
investment_sources.coverage: Centralized activity-data exchange between short-term rental platforms and communes/EPCI, including days rented, address and listing URLs by registration number.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Access appears intended for communes/EPCI, not commercial bulk use. Use as regulatory signal unless access is granted.

investment_sources.name: Charges de copropriete benchmark
investment_sources.coverage: Benchmark reports for condominium operating charges; search result observed Foncia 2026 observatory based on 51,000 coproprietes and 1.5M lots.
investment_sources.legal_notes: Benchmark only. Actual copro charges require property documents and AG minutes.

renovation_sources.name: Milano

renovation_sources.name: Richardson

renovation_sources.name: La Maison Saint-Gobain

renovation_sources.legal_notes: Guide ranges are estimates. Keep source date and avoid treating as quote.

renovation_sources.name: RenoEstim
renovation_sources.coverage: Renovation cost guides by room and work package. Used for early installed-cost ranges.
renovation_sources.legal_notes: Guide ranges only; validate against quotes before client-facing precision.

renovation_sources.name: BatiPrix
renovation_sources.coverage: Paid professional French construction and renovation cost reference.

renovation_sources.name: Indice de prix des travaux d'entretien-amelioration de batiments
renovation_sources.coverage: IPEA quarterly indices based on observed prices charged by companies/artisans to final clients for works in existing buildings, including supply and installation of materials.
renovation_sources.legal_notes: Official index. Use as price movement, not a direct quote.

renovation_sources.name: Couts des travaux de renovation - Isolation
renovation_sources.coverage: Open dataset/study for energy renovation insulation work costs by renovation gesture and work package.
renovation_sources.legal_notes: Use study ranges with source vintage and local quote caveat.

renovation_sources.name: Bricofute
renovation_sources.coverage: French material price comparator by department, enseigne and category. Search result covers cement, mortar, concrete, plaster, sand, wood and retailers including Leroy Merlin, Castorama, Point.P, Gedimat and Bricomarche.
renovation_sources.legal_notes: Comparator data may be derived from third-party sites. Prefer partnership or manual benchmark, not scraping.

renovation_sources.name: BatiPrix.pro comparator
renovation_sources.coverage: Cote d'Azur/PACA material and tool price comparator. Search result observed 39,720 products, 25 enseignes and daily price verification.
renovation_sources.legal_notes: Independent comparator with affiliate links. Validate licensing before using derived data.

renovation_sources.name: BatiCompare
renovation_sources.coverage: French construction material price comparison across retailers such as Leroy Merlin, Castorama and Point.P.
renovation_sources.legal_notes: Use as competitor/reference unless data licensing is confirmed.

renovation_sources.name: MaterioScan
renovation_sources.coverage: Private beta material-price radar for Leroy Merlin, Castorama, Brico Depot, ManoMano, Mr Bricolage and more.
renovation_sources.legal_notes: Do not copy private/beta data. Use only public positioning unless partnership exists.

renovation_sources.name: Mr.Bricolage
renovation_sources.coverage: French DIY retailer for local material, paint, garden, hardware and small renovation supplies.
renovation_sources.legal_notes: Store/local availability matters. Check terms before automation.

renovation_sources.name: Bricomarche
renovation_sources.coverage: French DIY retailer for materials, home improvement, garden and tools.
renovation_sources.legal_notes: Store-specific inventory and delivery conditions must be captured.

renovation_sources.name: Bricoman France
renovation_sources.coverage: Professional/trade-oriented DIY and building-material retailer in France.
renovation_sources.legal_notes: Capture trade/public price distinction when available.

renovation_sources.name: Lapeyre

renovation_sources.name: Zolpan

renovation_sources.name: Espace Aubade

renovation_sources.legal_notes: Showroom quotes and public prices can differ. Keep quote date/store.

renovation_sources.name: Tereva

renovation_sources.name: Wurth France

renovation_sources.name: Amalme

renovation_sources.name: Insha'at Marketplace

renovation_sources.name: MawadOnline
renovation_sources.coverage: UAE construction-focused B2B marketplace. Search result says an API feature is being developed for inventory/database connection.

renovation_sources.name: ClickCement
renovation_sources.coverage: B2B marketplace and e-store platform for building materials with standardized categories and listings.

renovation_sources.coverage: Dubai construction-material price indicator report with group movements for steel, cement and other major materials.
renovation_sources.refresh: historical reference; pair with current Dubai Pulse dataset
renovation_sources.legal_notes: Historical official report. Use for trend context, not current pricing.

renovation_sources.name: Linesight UAE Commodities and Insights
renovation_sources.coverage: UAE construction-material pricing report for commodities such as copper, steel, asphalt, bricks, concrete, cement, plasterboard and diesel.

renovation_sources.name: AL ADRAN

renovation_sources.refresh: monthly RFQ or supplier quote capture
renovation_sources.legal_notes: RFQ pricing only; do not infer price without quote.

renovation_sources.name: The New Excellent Building Material Trading
renovation_sources.publisher: The New Excellent Building Material Trading LLC
renovation_sources.coverage: Dubai building-material supplier for plumbing, sanitary, structural steel, aggregates, cement, raw materials and project/bulk enquiries.

next_ingestion_steps: Create official ingestion first: DLD transactions, DLD rent contracts, Dubai CPI, Dubai construction material prices, DVF+, INSEE CPI, INSEE BT01/BT50, OLL rents, encadrement des loyers.
Create retailer snapshots second: ACE, Danube Home, NQCART, Leroy Merlin, Castorama, Brico Depot, POINT.P, CEDEO.
